tool_args.label: Marijuana Legalization in Workplace Policy
tool_args.raw_text: NY, NJ and CT have passed legislation making recreational use of Marijuana legal. Marijuana remains illegal under federal law. tool_args.label: COVID-19 Updates April 2022
tool_args.raw_text: Based on CDC guidelines, in office mask mandate not required. Started to offer the second booster for those that are eligible. 1.17% positivity rate.

payload.claim_text: Based on CDC guidelines, in office mask mandate not required. Started to offer the second booster for those that are eligible. Established 700+ test sites on MTA properties. Provide 2 types of testing: Nasal Swab or Saliva. 10,000-11,000 tests each week. >319K tests collected since program officially started. ~96% weekly compliance for vac or test program.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Based on CDC guidelines, in office mask mandate not required
